response_fields.answer: string — final safe answer (possibly repaired or fallback)
response_fields.sources: list[dict] — source objects with chunk_id, filename, page
response_fields.answerability: object | null — status, reason_codes, evidence_count, document_count, missing_requirements
response_fields.validation: object | null — status, checked_claim_count, supported_claim_count, unsupported_claim_count, issues

events.token: data: {type: token, content: answer} — single token event with final safe answer
events.done: data: {type: done, sources, confidence, calculations, answerability?, validation?, repair?}
events.error: data: {type: error, detail: {error_code, message}, retryable, trace_id}

safety_guarantees: Blocked answers are NOT streamed as partial LLM tokens
Safe fallback is emitted as a single token event
Error events use error_code, not str(exc)
SSE done event includes validation verdicts when pipeline enabled
